name: Everything Search MCP Server
description: An MCP server that provides fast file searching capabilities across Windows, macOS, and Linux. On Windows, it uses the Everything SDK. On macOS, it uses the built-in mdfind command. On Linux, it uses the locate/plocate command.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Universal file search tool for Windows, macOS, and Linux. Supports platform-specific search capabilities using Everything SDK on Windows, mdfind on macOS, and locate on Linux.

query.description: Search query string. See the search syntax guide for details.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-1000)

match_path.description: Match against full path instead of filename only

sort_by.description: Sort order for results (Note: Not all sort options available on all platforms)

env.name: EVERYTHING_SDK_PATH
env.description: Path to Everything SDK DLL on Windows
